title: getDSPInstance
text: getDSPInstance Returns a reference to the uniface.Instance object that contains the current object. Deprecated. Important: The function getDSPInstance is deprecated. Use getInstance instead. For more information, see getInstance() . Object . getDSPInstance() Arguments None Return Value Returns a reference to the uniface.Instance object. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Example: Using getInstance Using the this keyword to get the current object, use getInstance to get the parent component instance and activate an operation. Explain this code this.getInstance().activate("myoperation"); Copy Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. uniface.Occurrence The uniface.Occurrence object provides access to selected properties of the occurrence that it represents. It is returned by the getOccurrence function of the uniface.Entity object. uniface.Field The uniface.Field object provides access to selected properties of the field that it represents. It is returned by the getField function of uniface.Occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
